a:I[8172,["972","static/chunks/972-66d51a7cc4f97c94.js","196","static/chunks/196-f2bfcbb86a691470.js","246","static/chunks/app/post/%5Bid%5D/page-d539675d117d5f45.js"],"default"]
b:I[1255,["972","static/chunks/972-66d51a7cc4f97c94.js","196","static/chunks/196-f2bfcbb86a691470.js","246","static/chunks/app/post/%5Bid%5D/page-d539675d117d5f45.js"],"default"]
2:["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12","children":[["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/","className":"inline-flex items-center text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-gray-400 mb-12 transition-colors","children":[["$","svg",null,{"className":"w-4 h-4 mr-1","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","children":["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","strokeWidth":2,"d":"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"}]}],"返回"]}],["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-12","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 leading-tight","children":"ADHD时间感缺失、失眠症、记录与对抗遗忘"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":[["$","time",null,{"className":"tabular-nums","children":"2025/04/17"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex gap-2","children":[["$","span","daily",{"className":"text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":["#","daily"]}],["$","span","记录",{"className":"text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":["#","记录"]}]]}]]}]]}],["$","article",null,{"className":"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none","children":["$","$La",null,{"content":"ADHD时间感缺失、失眠症、记录与对抗遗忘\n\n《百年孤独》里有一个有趣的情节，马孔多的人患上了失眠症，失去睡眠，可以没日没夜的醒着，代价是，遗忘。\n我想大概是因为失去了睡眠，过去，昨天，跟现在，将来模糊了边界，所以遗忘。\n\n一开始只是忘记很久之前的事情，慢慢忘记昨天发生了什么，最后甚至忘记身边的东西的名称，以至于在何塞阿尔卡迪奥家里写满了标签，用来对抗遗忘，记录身边东西的用途。\n\n比如：这是汤匙，用来喝汤的。(汤，喝了让人饱腹的热东西，不要用手直接拿……)\n\n后来我读了很多关于ADHD的书，了解到了ADHDer时间盲这一概念，突然有了新的想法，失眠症，太像adhd的时间盲这一概念了。\n\nADHDer大脑中缺乏时间观念，分不开过去与现在将来，时间感知的缺失，确实是很难回忆起过去。\n因为你分不开过去与现在，自然也很难回忆起过去。\n\n大概与何塞阿尔卡迪奥一样，为了对抗遗忘，在我成长过程中，我也默契的选择记了很多的日志，笔记，说明，但这些东西，就像ADHDer的思维一样，散落在各个地方。\n\n项目上有个补丁，二月份的时候出的，今天找到我说测试了，发现有问题。\n\n我第一瞬间其实是懵的，完全忘了这个需求是什么了，找到当时我的日志：\n\n![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b4410d4c-7a5c-4b4d-928c-0b600375bb3c)\n\n我突然很想知道，2025.2.20我在哪里，那天发生了什么，我当时又是如何排查到了这个问题的？\n\n看了一下日历，那天也是星期四，元宵节刚过去的一个星期左右，剩下的，一片空白，如果不是有这个记录，过去仿佛不存在一样……\n\n那，过去又该如何存在呢？"}]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"postId":"119"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800","children":["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/","className":"inline-flex items-center text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors","children":[["$","svg",null,{"className":"w-4 h-4 mr-1","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","children":["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","strokeWidth":2,"d":"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"}]}],"返回首页"]}]}]]}]
